Back End: CMS Sim Weights Models Architecture Tests Reference

Model Configuration

Configure simulation model weights — results carry over to Simulation page
Batting Models
Bowling Models
Model Weightage 0 / 100
Assign weights to each configured model card (max 100 total). Weighted points = raw card points × (weight ÷ card's own points setting).
Batting Models — Summary
Bowling Models — Summary

Results Preview

Configure weights above, select a model, and click Apply to see ranked results.
Batting Filters
Bowling Filters
No data — select a model with valid weights to see results

Weighted Scores

Each card's raw score × (card weight ÷ 100). Sorted by weighted total.
Set at least one model to 100% to enable
Use Export Config to copy weights as JSON. Import reads a JSON file back in. Config persists in localStorage automatically. Click View in Simulation to pass weights to simulation.html via URL and see full ranked results there.
